title: The Magic Toy Shop 11" Blue Teddy Bear with Ribbon - Super Soft Cuddly Stuffed Animal Toy - Suitable from Birth, Nursery Decor Gift for Newborn Baby Girls & Boys, Valentine's Day, Christening
features: SUPER SOFT & CUDDLY COMPANION: This blue teddy bear is crafted from dense, high-quality fabric. The perfect cuddly toys for girls and boys for long hugs, bedtime snuggles, and companionship.
ADORABLE DESIGN DETAILS: Featuring a cute face and a matching ribbon, this cute plush teddy bear captures hearts. Its blue colour makes a charming addition to any nursery.
SUITABLE FROM BIRTH: Our baby soft toy safe for the newest family member. This plush toy is suitable for all ages. It offers a gentle sensory experience for infants and grows into toddlerhood.

PERFECT GIFT FOR ALL AGES: From plushies for girls and boys to romantic gestures. This stuffed animal makes an ideal present for Baby Showers, Christenings, or a sweet Valentine's day surprise for someone special.
